title: 🔥存量博弈避险为王
body: 市场进入残酷的存量博弈期。BTC.D 报 58.5%，逆势上涨 0.7%。资金疯狂涌入 BTC 抛售山寨币，表明市场信心丧失，流动性极度收敛。当前 dominance 水平接近历史高位区间，意味着绝大多数资产将面临失血阴跌。普涨行情彻底终结。偏空。资金何时重新回流？
title_en: 🔥 Zero-Sum Game, Flight to Safety Reigns Supreme
body_en: The market has entered a brutal phase of zero-sum trading. BTC.D sits at 58.5%, defying the trend with a 0.7% rise. Capital is frantically pouring into BTC and dumping alts, signaling a complete loss of confidence and extreme liquidity tightening. Current dominance levels are nearing historical highs, implying the vast majority of assets are facing a slow bleed. The broad-based rally is officially dead. Bearish. When will capital return?
